rawAssistant: Before you depart, may I inquire about your intentions? Are you ensuring that Thornbeast is properly secured and rested for its journey, or perhaps checking the road ahead to avoid any potential dangers? As a Monster Ethicist, it pains me to see even a moment of distress in our bond.
